title: SCP-173 The real Peanut
description: This mod adds SCP-173 to minecraft.
body:
# About this Mod
This mod ads SCP-173 to minecraft. It is verry fast and strong. If you get too close to it, it will hunt you down. SCP-173 spawns in a new structure that resembels a prison.

## Updates
This mod will get updates that ad new creatures and structures.
The release date is still unknown but they will release soon.

### Planed Features
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- A new pocket dimension
- SCP-087 - The Stairwell


</details>
